world.title: For the first time, a kosher restaurant has won a Michelin star
world.description: Israeli chef Raz Shabtai’s Miami restaurant Mutra becomes the first kosher restaurant to receive a Michelin star, marking a historic breakthrough for kosher cuisine and the Jewish culinary world.
